TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tom_Arnold_(actor), title = Tom_Arnold_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Arnold_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Tom Arnold kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Tom Arnold, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Tom Arnold kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Tom Arnold, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tom arnol* kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tom arnol*, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
